themes.animation_broken_ROOT: ~7 條同根:fade/zoom/slide class 無 CSS(外掛未裝)→ 動畫全 no-op。VERIFIED 真(built CSS 0 rule)。系統性,7 浮層共病 → 待 motion workflow + user 拍板
themes.pure_primitive_overclaim: spec/anatomy 說『只提供 z-index/動畫/sideOffset』但 wrapper 還做 Portal/collision/align/viewport/flex/outline → doc-honest 修
themes.pointer_grace: 『hover 離開即消失』vs disableHoverableContent=false pointer-grace 保持開 → doc-honest 修(同 Tooltip)
themes.aria_token_mismatch: role=button vs img / aria-haspopup 未設 / bg-surface-raised metadata 未消費 → 逐條驗後修
themes.principles_dead_link: 示例 a 無 href/onClick 但說『可點進去』→ 修範例或描述

themes.animation_broken_ROOT: 同 HoverCard 根因(popover.tsx:103-104 class 無 CSS)
themes.focus_selector_incomplete: auto-focus selector 只查 input/textarea/select/button,漏 a[href]/[tabindex]/contenteditable → 真 code 限制,待驗後決定改 code 或 doc
themes.hideClose_overclaim: 『一律附右上 X』但 PopoverHeader 接 hideClose → doc-honest 修
themes.modal_close_only: 『modal 必須按 Close 才能關』但 Esc/outside 仍可 dismiss → doc-honest 修
themes.line_number_drift: spec 引 popover.tsx:69 實為 :102 / max-h 值 doc 缺 fallback 100vh → doc-honest 修
themes.aria_labelledby_conditional: 『PopoverTitle 自動接 aria-labelledby』只在未傳自訂 id 時 → doc-honest 修(補條件)
